name: Golden Triangle Tour with Haridwar & Rishikesh
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Haridwar, Rishikesh, Agra, Jaipur with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer t
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel & after refresh proceed to visit Red Fort, Rajghat, India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’s Tomb, Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Delhi – Haridawar (250 KM
itinerary.description: Delhi – Haridawar (250 KM. Approx. 6 Hrs.) – Today after breakfast proceed to Haridwar check in & after refresh proceed to Afternoon visit Daksh Temple, Pawan Dham as well as Moti Bazar. Go To Har Ki Pauri for Ganga Aarti. Return to the hotel. Dinner and Night stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh: After breakfast visit Mansa Devi Temple (By cable car)
itinerary.description: Rishikesh: After breakfast visit Mansa Devi Temple (By cable car). Transfer to Rishikesh. Go to Triveni Ghat, Bharat Mandir, Lakshman Temple, Lakshman Jhula as well as Ram Jhula. Evening visit Ganga Aarti at Parmarth Niketan. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Hridwar – Agra (410 KM
itinerary.description: Hridwar – Agra (410 KM. Approx. 7 Hrs.) – : After breakfast, drive to Agra and over night stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra – Fatehpur Sikri – Jaipur (250 KM
itinerary.description: Agra – Fatehpur Sikri – Jaipur (250 KM. Approx. 6-7 Hrs.) – Today, After breakfast Morning guided tour to visit the Taj mahal and Agra fort and drive to Jaipur (Pink City) – En-route we make a stop for visit Fatehpur Sikri, And proceed to Jaipur . Overnight stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: Today, after breakfast guided to visit ancient capital of Amber
itinerary.description: Today, after breakfast guided to visit ancient capital of Amber. Visit beautiful Amber Fort & take a picture of Water Palace & Take a picture of beautiful Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), visit City Place and Observatory(Jantar Mantar), Rajasthani handicraft. Overnight stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi – Jaipur (280 KM
itinerary.description:
Delhi – Jaipur (280 KM. Approx. 7 Hrs.) – After breakfast proceed to Delhi and drop you at the Airport with Sweet Memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Closed on every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meal
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
Comfortable vehicles AC
Guide Service
Chauffeur
Exclusions
Meals other than those

seo.title: Golden Triangle Tour with Haridwar & Rishikesh | Mother India Tour Travels
seo.description: Book Golden Triangle Tour with Haridwar & Rishikesh with Mother India Tour Travels. Best deals on Delhi, Haridwar, Rishikesh, Agra, Jaipur tour packages. Includes hotels, transport & guide.
